title: satureja granatensis
intro: Satureja granatensis, also known as Spanish savory, is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Satureja granatensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or infused in vinegar, and is often used in culinary dishes to add flavor and medicinal properties.
